zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothie Barker於1542年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可奧可福德時，她的父親George Vessey7歲，母親Marian Mary Ann Woodward16歲。她於1558年與Edmond Baker在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格亞特 巴林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年11月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布利其沃特享年23歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布利其沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothie Barker于1542年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可奧可福德时，她的父亲George Vessey7岁，母亲Marian Mary Ann Woodward16岁。她于1558年与Edmond Baker在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格亞特 巴林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年11月在英国英格兰薩默塞特布利其沃特享年23岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特布利其沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothie Barker was born in 1542, in Oxford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, George Vessey, was 7 and her mother, Marian Mary Ann Woodward, was 16. She married Edmond Baker in 1558, in Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in November 1565, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 23, and was buried in Bridgwater, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothie Barker est née en 1542, à Oxford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Vessey, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Marian Mary Ann Woodward, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Edmond Baker en 1558, à Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1565, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothie Barker 1542 in Oxford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Vessey 7 und ihre Mutter Marian Mary Ann Woodward 16. Sie hat 1558 in Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Edmond Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1565 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bridgwater, Somerset, England begraben.

Lei sposato Edmond Baker nel 1558, nel Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Dorothie Barkerが1542年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクオクスフォードで生まれた時，父George Vesseyは7歳，母Marian Mary Ann Woodwardは16歳であった。1558年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグレアト バーリントンでEdmond Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年11月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで23歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトブリドグワターにて埋葬された。

ko.Oxford, Suffolk, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 스퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothie Barker(이)가 1542년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Vessey(은)는 7세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marian Mary Ann Woodward(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그리트 배링턴에서 Edmond Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브리지왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothie Barker nasceu em 1542, em Oxford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Vessey, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Marian Mary Ann Woodward, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmond Baker em 1558, em Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1565, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Oxford, Suffolk, England: оксфорд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothie Barker родилась в 1542 г. в местности оксфорд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Vessey было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Marian Mary Ann Woodward, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmond Baker в 1558 г. в местности грит баррингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1565 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothie Barker nació en 1542, en Oxford, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, George Vessey, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Marian Mary Ann Woodward, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Edmond Baker en 1558, en Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1565, en Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra.
